items.title: IEC 62056 — DLMS/COSEM
items.summary: International standard for electricity meter data exchange. Defines the COSEM object model and DLMS protocol stack used by modern smart meters and head-end systems.
items.isvRelevance: Core to ISV OpenAMI and Tech Comm metering work. DLMS keys and proprietary OEM layers sit on top of this — field deployments need meter-agnostic HES/DCU paths aligned to 62056.

items.title: IEC 62055 — STS prepaid metering
items.summary: Standard Transfer Specification for prepaid electricity tokens — 20-digit codes, vending, and key management. Transport-agnostic; does not define reverse telemetry to the token server.
items.isvRelevance: ~64% of operator fleets still use legacy STS hardware. ISV must support STS token paths (including SMS → phone) alongside DLMS without assuming two-way STS feedback.

items.title: gridds: A Data Science Toolkit for Energy Grid Machine Learning
items.summary: Open-source toolkit for grid ML — AMI, SCADA, GIS, and synchrophasor data. Includes anomaly detection workflows on μPMU voltage channels.
items.isvRelevance: Reference for time-series and anomaly methods on village-scale metering telemetry. Code: https://github.com/LLNL/gridds

items.title: G3-PLC hybrid PLC + RF mesh
items.summary: Neighborhood-area networking combining power-line and RF mesh — common COTS option for AMI NAN layers to DCU.
items.isvRelevance: Documents parallel NAN channels (RF mesh + PLC) discussed in Tech Comm topology notes. Complements supplemental phone/repeater relay when mesh LOS fails.

items.title: Delta AMI smart meter communication overview
items.summary: Vendor overview of AMI architecture — NB-IoT, Sub-1G RF, and LTE as WAN options for smart meter deployments.
items.isvRelevance: Useful reference for redundant uplink/NAN options mapped in ISV topology diagrams (RF mesh, PLC, cellular WAN).

items.title: MicroPowerManager — open minigrid utility platform
items.summary: Open-source customer, revenue, and asset management for decentralized utilities. Integrates multiple prepaid meter vendors (SteamaCo, SparkMeter, Calin, etc.).
items.isvRelevance: Shows how field operators stitch STS-compliant meters into billing stacks — relevant to ISV interoperability and vendor-package patterns.

items.title: IEEE 1547-2018 — DER interconnection
items.summary: Standard for interconnection and interoperability of distributed energy resources with the grid — ride-through, power quality, export limits.
items.isvRelevance: Foundation for behind-the-meter solar, storage, and microgrid tie-in at ISV village sites. Listed on wiki Standards page.

items.title: SunSpec Alliance — DER information models
items.summary: Open standards for solar, storage, and hybrid device data models — widely used in inverter and edge telemetry.
items.isvRelevance: ISV OpenAMI targets SunSpec-compatible microgrid asset reporting alongside utility metering stacks.
